question.text: A research analyst must disclose the use of:

answer.text: Only Microsoft Excel in data analysis
Artificial Intelligence tools in providing research services

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 19(vii): A research analyst shall disclose to the client the extent of use of Artificial Intelligence tools in providing research services. **The Trap:** This is a newer requirement reflecting the growing use of AI in research. Other tools don't require specific disclosure. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 14 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** AI disclosure is becoming increasingly important as more analysts use AI/ML models. Clients have the right to know the role of AI in research.
